battle.translate: битва, бой, сражение, борьба, сражаться, бороться, боевой, батальный
mnemonic:
battle ['bæt (ə) l]
***
СРАЖАТЬСЯ, значит, батл. (это) battle
БОРЬБА И БИТВА - просто батл. (это) battle
***
Если слышишь грохот "rattle",
значит, это битва "battle".

examples.eng: Doctors battled to save his life.
examples.ru: Врачи боролись, чтобы спасти его жизнь.

examples.eng: The battle of good versus evil
the site of the battle
Design a strategy for battle.
He was killed in a fierce battle.
examples.ru: Он был убит в жестокой битве.

examples.eng: 32 teams will battle it out.
examples.ru: За победу сразятся тридцать две команды.

examples.eng: Her son was killed in battle.
The battle turned into a rout.
the decisive battle of the war
He showed great heroism in battle.
examples.ru: Он проявил большой героизм в боях.

examples.eng: They were vanquished in battle.
He fought a battle for recognition.
The soldiers formed into battle order.
They armed the men for battle.
She had battled against cancer.
The battle raged on (=continued).
examples.ru: Битва продолжалась с той же яростью.

examples.eng: That two-day conflict has become one of the most famous battles in history.
examples.ru: Этот двухдневный конфликт стал одним из самых знаменитых сражений в истории.

examples.eng: an array of troops in battle order
The troops were deployed for battle.
They were arrayed in line of battle.
Few women have led troops in battle.
examples.ru: Мало кто из женщин вёл войска в бой.

examples.eng: He survived the great test of battle.
a long and agonizing battle with cancer
examples.ru: долгая и мучительная борьба с раком

examples.eng: The town was shelled during the battle.
examples.ru: Во время боя город подвергся обстрелу.

examples.eng: He deserted in the midst of the battle.
examples.ru: Он дезертировал в самый разгар битвы.

examples.eng: The battle began with a cavalry charge.
They reenacted the battle of Princeton.
The battle took place in neutral waters.
a political battle of heroic proportions
the expense of a protracted legal battle
